name: basic-rbac
description: Implement a basic RBAC policy in Rego with user-role and role-permission mappings

name: docker-authz-security
description: Write a Docker daemon authorization policy in Rego that prevents privileged containers and disabled seccomp profiles

name: http-api-authorization
description: Write an HTTP API authorization policy in Rego that decodes a JWT token and controls access based on method, path, and manager-subordinate relationships

name: terraform-iac-validation
description: Write a Terraform plan validation policy in Rego that prevents aws_security_group resources from allowing inbound SSH access from the internet

name: kubernetes-admission-control
description: Write a Kubernetes admission control policy in Rego using the kube-mgmt pattern (package kubernetes.admission, deny contains msg)

name: kubernetes-gatekeeper
description: Write a Gatekeeper ConstraintTemplate Rego policy using the violation rule with input.review.object and input.parameters

name: policy-metadata-annotations
description: Write a Rego policy with full OPA metadata annotations at package and rule level including title, description, authors, entrypoint markers, and custom fields

name: policy-testing
description: Write a Rego policy and tests using OPA test conventions including _test package suffix, input/data mocking with `with`, and deny message verification
